name: create_api
steps: Define the route path and HTTP method explicitly.
Validate request input with a Pydantic model or clear Python validation.
Keep business logic separate from transport concerns when practical.
Handle expected errors and return appropriate HTTP status codes.
Write concise docstrings for public endpoint functions.
Return predictable response shapes with typed values.
Write comprehensive tests for edge cases
examples: GET /users returns a list and supports pagination inputs.
POST /users validates the body, checks duplicates, and returns 201 on success.
